title: MyMissionHub Release Automation
summary: Designed and implemented GitHub Actions release automation with auto version bumping, artifact packaging, and deployment flow controls to reduce manual release overhead.

title: Desktop App Update Path Modernization
summary: Reframed desktop updates away from ClickOnce constraints to a web-hosted manifest and package model with startup version checks and guided update prompts.

title: AI-Guided Team Workflow Integration
summary: Rolled out instruction-governed, persona-based AI collaboration patterns to improve consistency across architecture, development, QA, and release operations.

title: Enterprise Platform Transition Leadership
summary: Led modernization planning and implementation across integration, web, and data layers, balancing technical debt reduction against ongoing delivery commitments.
